title: Dimensional Analysis Practice
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive MicroSim that scaffolds dimensional analysis problems with live unit cancellation feedback.

learningObjectives: Apply conversion factors to multi-step unit changes
Interpret cancellation cues to verify correct units

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Guided practice with immediate visual feedback
keyQuestions: Which units cancel after applying this factor?
Do I need another tile to generate the target unit?
commonMisconceptions: Using inverse ratios for unit conversions
Stopping when the numeric answer seems reasonable but units are incorrect
assessmentOpportunities: Record correct/attempted ratios as part of formative assessment
